seo.title: Vijayalakkshmi Pharma | Pharma Raw Materials Supplier in Hyderabad
seo.description: Vijayalakkshmi Pharma supplies pharmaceutical excipients, solvents, pharma colours, amino acids, nutraceutical ingredients, and industrial chemicals from L.B. Nagar, Hyderabad to manufacturers across India.

hero.title: Pharmaceutical & Chemical Raw Materials Supplier
hero.description: Reliable sourcing for pharma-grade excipients, solvents, colours, amino acids, and nutraceutical ingredients with responsive supply support across India.

categoryIntro.title: Product Categories
categoryIntro.description: Browse a focused range of pharmaceutical raw materials, solvents, colours, and formulation ingredients.

featuredIntro.title: Popular Products
featuredIntro.description: High-demand raw materials available for immediate enquiry.

items.title: Pharma Grade Quality
items.description: Products are available in IP, BP, and USP grades with COA documentation where applicable.

items.title: Wide Product Range
items.description: A broad catalogue covering solvents, excipients, colours, amino acids, vitamins, polymers, and nutraceutical ingredients.

items.title: Verified Sourcing
items.description: Materials are sourced from established manufacturers and import channels in India and key international markets.

items.title: Flexible Quantities
items.description: Supply support for drums, bags, tankers, and smaller production quantities based on product availability.

items.title: Pan India Delivery
items.description: Regular supply to formulation units, traders, and manufacturers across Hyderabad, Telangana, and major Indian cities.

items.title: Quick Enquiry Response
items.description: Fast quotations for product price, packing, grade, origin, MOQ, and delivery schedule.

cta.title: Ready to Source Pharma Raw Materials?
cta.description: Call, WhatsApp, or send an enquiry for pricing, packing, grade, availability, and dispatch details.
